name: 11q23_KMT2A_MLL_SD
description: 11q23.3 segmental duplication region around KMT2A (MLL). KMT2A is itself a member of a large paralog family (KMT2A-D) and its breakpoint cluster region (BCR) is flanked by Alu/SD elements that mediate the recurrent translocations t(4;11), t(9;11), t(11;19) found in infant ALL and therapy-related AML.

architecture.internal_structure: Alu-rich KMT2A BCR (~8.3 kb) flanked by short SDs; partial tandem duplication (PTD) of KMT2A exons 2-8 is a recurrent somatic event in AML.

related_diseases: KMT2A partial tandem duplication (PTD) in AML
